title: epipactis nordeniorum subsp. mecsekensis
intro: Epipactis nordeniorum subsp. mecsekensis, also known as Mecsek helleborine, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Central Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, it has been prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusions, and is used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
